race.comment: DON'T SAY DO (8) started favourite but was no match for a runaway winner over 1200m at Bathurst last time out. Fitter for two runs back from a spell and he doesn't mind the sting out of the ground. TRAPEAZY (12) has not raced since working home strongly to get up for third on debut over 1000m at Canberra on 6 February. Placed in a recent trial here so a bright return looks on the cards. BICKNOLLER (1) is a first starter by Hellbent from a Henny Hughes mare who has produced three winners from as many foals to race. Went close in a recent trial here so he looks to have some ability. CASSIE'S ANGEL (2) did nothing first-up at Port Macquarie but deserves another chance. CELESTIAL DEAL (6) is a Waterhouse/Bott first starter by Bivouac. Has been to the trials no less than six times. Not shooting the lights out but never underestimate the stable.
